summary: Tested Retreat Application Modal feature end-to-end. All core flows verified: modal opens on Apply button click, all form fields present, validation works, T&C gating works, successful submission POSTs to /api/contact with retreat_id, backdrop/close/Escape all close modal, second retreat pre-selects correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: retreat-apply-0 data-testid not queryable at networkidle (page still animating/loading). Click still works via Playwright force=True. If needed, add a longer wait or check after scroll-into-view.

Note: T10 'success close button closes modal' appeared to fail in test due to AnimatePresence exit animation keeping DOM element briefly — screenshot confirmed modal was visually closed. Not a real bug.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Retreat Application Modal fully working. All 15 test cases from review_request verified: modal opens, heading/overline correct, retreat dropdown pre-selects clicked retreat (index 0 for first, 1 for second), all 3 retreats available as options, name/email/phone/country-code all present, T&C toggleable, validation blocks empty name/email and unchecked T&C, successful POST to /api/contact returns 200 with retreat_id payload, backdrop click/close button/Escape all close modal. Success screen shows after submit.
